prophecies.q: 凯西对经济形势的解读
prophecies.a: 「除非在主的子民中建立更多的兄弟之爱和团体意识……否则整个金融体系在未来数年将会陷入崩溃。」（解读 #137-4）
prophecies.q_en: Cayce's reading on the economic situation
prophecies.a_en: "Unless there is more of the spirit of brotherly love and group consciousness among His people... the whole financial system will come to a collapse in the next few years." (Reading #137-4)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1929年10月29日，美国股市崩盘（「黑色星期二」），引发大萧条。凯西早在1925年的解读中已警告金融体系将崩溃。
prophecies.verdict_en: On October 29, 1929 ('Black Tuesday'), the US stock market crashed, triggering the Great Depression. Cayce had warned of a financial collapse as early as his 1925 reading.

prophecies.q: 凯西对欧洲局势的解读
prophecies.a: 「奥地利、德国，以及后来的日本，将加入结盟势力。」（解读 #3976-15）
prophecies.a_en: "Austria, Germany, and later Japan, will join forces." (Reading #3976-15)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1936年德日签署《反共产国际协定》，1937年意大利加入，1940年三国签署《三国同盟条约》，正式形成轴心国联盟。凯西1935年的解读准确预见了这一结盟。
prophecies.verdict_en: Germany and Japan signed the Anti-Comintern Pact in 1936, Italy joined in 1937, and the Tripartite Pact was signed in 1940, formally establishing the Axis powers. Cayce's 1935 reading accurately foresaw this alliance.

prophecies.q: 凯西对二战结束的预测
prophecies.q_en: Cayce's prediction on the end of WWII
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1945年5月8日德国投降（欧战胜利日），同年8月15日日本投降，第二次世界大战正式结束。凯西在1943年准确预言了终战年份。
prophecies.verdict_en: Germany surrendered on May 8, 1945 (V-E Day), and Japan surrendered on August 15, 1945, officially ending WWII. Cayce accurately predicted the year of peace in his 1943 reading.

prophecies.q: 凯西对罗斯福总统的解读
prophecies.a: 「如果不减轻压力，他的身体将无法支撑完任期。」（解读 #3976-28）
prophecies.a_en: "Unless the strain is removed, his body will not endure through the term." (Reading #3976-28)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 富兰克林·罗斯福于1945年4月12日因脑溢血去世，未能完成第四个总统任期。凯西在1944年的解读中已暗示其健康难以支撑。
prophecies.verdict_en: Franklin D. Roosevelt died of a cerebral hemorrhage on April 12, 1945, failing to complete his fourth term. Cayce's 1944 reading had implied his health would not hold.

prophecies.q: 凯西对以色列建国的预言
prophecies.a: 「犹太人终将回到他们的故土，并在那里重建国家。」（解读 #5748-2）
prophecies.q_en: Cayce's prophecy on the founding of Israel
prophecies.a_en: "The Jews will eventually return to their homeland and re-establish their nation." (Reading #5748-2)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1948年5月14日，以色列宣布独立建国。凯西早在1930年代的解读中便提到犹太人将返回故土重建国家。
prophecies.verdict_en: Israel declared independence on May 14, 1948. Cayce had mentioned the return of Jews to their homeland and the re-establishment of their nation in his readings from the 1930s.

prophecies.q: 凯西对亚特兰蒂斯的解读
prophecies.a: 「波塞迪亚将是亚特兰蒂斯首批升出海面的部分——预计在1968年或1969年。」（解读 #958-3）
prophecies.a_en: "Poseidia will be among the first portions of Atlantis to rise again — expect it in '68 or '69." (Reading #958-3)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 亚特兰蒂斯本身并未重现。但1968年在巴哈马比米尼岛附近海底发现了规则排列的石灰岩结构（「比米尼之路」），一些研究者认为这可能与凯西的预言有关。主流地质学家则认为这是自然形成的海滩岩。
prophecies.verdict_en: Atlantis itself did not resurface. However, in 1968, a regular limestone formation ('Bimini Road') was discovered on the ocean floor near Bimini, Bahamas. Some researchers link this to Cayce's prediction, though mainstream geologists consider it naturally formed beachrock.

prophecies.q: 凯西对埃及「记录大厅」的预言
prophecies.a: 「在狮身人面像的右前爪下方，有一个通道通向记录大厅，其中保存着亚特兰蒂斯文明的完整记录。这些记录将在1998年被发现。」（解读 #378-16）
prophecies.q_en: Cayce's prophecy on the Hall of Records in Egypt
prophecies.a_en: "Beneath the right front paw of the Sphinx lies a passage to the Hall of Records, containing the complete history of Atlantean civilization. These records will be discovered in 1998." (Reading #378-16)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至目前，狮身人面像下方未发现任何「记录大厅」。1990年代曾进行过地震波探测，发现了一些地下空洞，但未发掘出任何文明记录。埃及当局也未批准进一步挖掘。
prophecies.verdict_en: No 'Hall of Records' has been found beneath the Sphinx to date. Seismic surveys in the 1990s detected some underground cavities, but no civilization records were unearthed. Egyptian authorities have not authorized further excavation.

prophecies.q: 凯西对地球变动的预言
prophecies.a: 「纽约市、康涅狄格州的大部分地区将在人的一生中消失。纽约城的西部上区域终将在某天消失。」（解读 #1152-11）
prophecies.a_en: "New York City, much of Connecticut will disappear within a generation. The upper portion of the western area of New York City will eventually vanish." (Reading #1152-11)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 纽约市和康涅狄格州并未发生大规模沉没或消失事件。虽然纽约面临海平面上升威胁，2012年飓风桑迪造成严重洪灾，但远未达到「消失」的程度。
prophecies.verdict_en: New York City and Connecticut have not experienced large-scale submersion or disappearance. While New York faces rising sea levels and Hurricane Sandy in 2012 caused severe flooding, this is far from 'disappearing'.

prophecies.q: 凯西对加利福尼亚的预言
prophecies.a: 「洛杉矶和旧金山将在纽约之前被毁灭。」（解读 #1152-11）
prophecies.a_en: "Los Angeles and San Francisco will be destroyed before New York." (Reading #1152-11)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 洛杉矶和旧金山至今仍然完好。虽然加州地处地震带，时有地震发生（如1989年洛马普列塔地震、1994年北岭地震），但从未出现过城市被毁灭的情况。
prophecies.verdict_en: Los Angeles and San Francisco remain intact. While California sits on seismic fault lines and experiences earthquakes (1989 Loma Prieta, 1994 Northridge), no city-destroying event has occurred.

prophecies.q: 凯西对地极转移的预言
prophecies.a: 「2000至2001年间，地球将发生地轴偏移。」（解读 #826-8）
prophecies.a_en: "There will be a shifting of the poles in 2000 to 2001." (Reading #826-8)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2000至2001年间地球未发生地轴偏移。地磁北极确实在持续缓慢移动（每年约55公里），但这是正常的地磁漂移，与凯西所描述的灾难性地极转移完全不同。
prophecies.verdict_en: No pole shift occurred in 2000-2001. The magnetic north pole does continue to drift slowly (~55 km/year), but this is normal geomagnetic drift, entirely different from the catastrophic pole shift Cayce described.

prophecies.a: 「有一天，中国将成为基督教的摇篮——适用于人类生活的基督教。在遥远的未来，这一定会实现。」（解读 #3976-29）
prophecies.a_en: "One day China will be the cradle of Christianity — as applied to the lives of men. It is far off, as man counts time, but only a day in the heart of God." (Reading #3976-29)

prophecies.a: 「从俄罗斯将诞生世界的希望——不是那种有时被称为共产主义或布尔什维克主义的东西——而是自由！真正的自由！每个人都将为他的同胞而活。」（解读 #3976-29）
prophecies.a_en: "From Russia will come the hope of the world — not in respect to what is sometimes termed Communism or Bolshevism — but freedom! True freedom! Where each man will live for his fellow man." (Reading #3976-29)

prophecies.q: 凯西对比米尼岛的预言
prophecies.a: 「在比米尼附近的海底，在淤泥之下，将发现亚特兰蒂斯古代神庙的遗迹。」（解读 #364-3）
prophecies.a_en: "Near Bimini, beneath the ocean floor and the slime of ages, will be found the remnants of an ancient Atlantean temple." (Reading #364-3)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1968年，潜水员在北比米尼岛海域发现了一条约800米长的水下石灰岩结构（「比米尼之路」）。支持者认为这是人工建造的古代遗迹，与凯西的预言吻合。但主流地质学家J. Gifford等人的研究表明，这些石块是自然形成的海滩岩，年代约3500年，并非古代文明遗迹。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 1968, divers discovered an approximately 800-meter underwater limestone formation ('Bimini Road') near North Bimini. Supporters consider it an artificial ancient structure matching Cayce's prediction. However, mainstream geologists including J. Gifford have shown these blocks are naturally formed beachrock approximately 3,500 years old, not ancient civilization remnants.

prophecies.q: 凯西对医学解读的预言
prophecies.a: 「身体需要使用蓖麻油热敷包，敷于腹部右侧，每周三次，每次一小时。这将有助于消除阻塞和毒素。」（解读 #294-8 等多份解读的典型处方）
prophecies.a_en: "The body should use castor oil packs applied to the right side of the abdomen, three times weekly for one hour each. This will help eliminate blockages and toxins." (Typical prescription from Reading #294-8 and many similar readings)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 凯西留下约9000份医学解读，涵盖各种疾病的诊断与治疗建议。部分疗法（如蓖麻油热敷、饮食调理）在替代医学领域至今仍被使用，但缺乏大规模临床试验验证。现代医学对其诊断的回顾性研究结果不一。
prophecies.verdict_en: Cayce left approximately 9,000 medical readings covering diagnoses and treatment suggestions for various ailments. Some therapies (castor oil packs, dietary adjustments) are still used in alternative medicine today, but lack large-scale clinical trial validation. Retrospective studies of his diagnoses by modern medicine show mixed results.

prophecies.q: 凯西对通讯技术的预言
prophecies.a: 「人们将能在家中通过一种装置与世界任何地方直接通信，并能看到对方。」（解读 #3976-15）
prophecies.a_en: "People will be able to communicate directly from their homes with anywhere in the world through a device, and be able to see one another." (Reading #3976-15)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 视频通话技术在21世纪初普及。2003年Skype发布，2010年苹果推出FaceTime，此后视频通话成为日常通讯方式。凯西1935年对这一技术的描述与现实高度吻合。
prophecies.verdict_en: Video calling technology became widespread in the early 21st century. Skype launched in 2003, Apple introduced FaceTime in 2010, and video calls have since become everyday communication. Cayce's 1935 description closely matches the reality.

prophecies.q: 凯西对血液诊断的预言
prophecies.a: 「将来有一天，仅通过一滴血就能获得关于身体全部状况的诊断。」（解读 #283-2）
prophecies.a_en: "The day will come when a single drop of blood will yield a diagnosis of the entire body's condition." (Reading #283-2)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 现代血液检测技术已可通过少量血样检测数百种指标（如基因测序、液态活检筛查癌症标志物）。虽然尚未实现「一滴血诊断全身」的程度，但技术发展方向与凯西的预见高度一致。
prophecies.verdict_en: Modern blood testing can detect hundreds of markers from small samples (genetic sequencing, liquid biopsies for cancer markers). While a full single-drop diagnosis is not yet achieved, the direction of technological development closely aligns with Cayce's vision.

prophecies.q: 凯西对全球地理变动的总体预言
prophecies.a: 「地球的许多地方将发生剧烈变动。北欧将在眨眼间被改变。日本的大部分将沉入海中。」（解读 #3976-15）
prophecies.q_en: Cayce's general prophecy on global geographic changes
prophecies.a_en: "Many portions of the earth will undergo dramatic changes. Northern Europe will be changed in the twinkling of an eye. The greater portion of Japan will go into the sea." (Reading #3976-15)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 北欧未发生剧烈地理变动，日本也未大面积沉没。2011年东日本大地震虽造成严重灾害，但日本国土面积几乎未变。凯西所预言的大规模地理剧变并未在指定时间范围内发生。
prophecies.verdict_en: Northern Europe has not undergone dramatic geographic changes, and Japan has not sunk. While the 2011 Tohoku earthquake caused severe damage, Japan's landmass remained virtually unchanged. The large-scale geographic upheavals Cayce predicted did not occur within the specified timeframe.

prophecies.q: 凯西对印度独立的预言
prophecies.a: 「印度将脱离英国的统治而独立。通过甘地式的和平抗争，这一天不会太远。」（解读 #3976-15 及相关解读）
prophecies.a_en: "India will gain its independence from British rule. Through Gandhi's method of peaceful resistance, that day is not far off." (Reading #3976-15 and related readings)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1947年8月15日，印度正式脱离英国统治宣布独立。甘地领导的非暴力不合作运动在独立进程中发挥了核心作用，与凯西1935年解读中的描述一致。
prophecies.verdict_en: India declared independence from British rule on August 15, 1947. Gandhi's nonviolent resistance movement played a central role in the independence process, consistent with Cayce's 1935 reading.
